Comment: force latest_snapshot mode on prod and export static

commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && python3 - <<"PY"
from pathlib import Path
import re
path = Path(".env")
text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
line = "RESULTS_API_DEFAULT_DATA_MODE=latest_snapshot"
if "RESULTS_API_DEFAULT_DATA_MODE=" in text:
    text = re.sub(r"^RESULTS_API_DEFAULT_DATA_MODE=.*$", line, text, flags=re.M)
else:
    text += "\n" + line + "\n"
path.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
print(line)
PY
 docker compose --env-file .env config --quiet && chmod +x deploy/ec2/deploy.sh && ./deploy/ec2/deploy.sh && docker compose exec -T results-api python - <<"PY"
from hermes.results_api.app import export_static_governor_results
print(export_static_governor_results())
PY'
